primary_detection.name: Hex Encoded Reverse Shell
primary_detection.description: Detected hex escape sequences used to obfuscate reverse shell payload

underlying_threats.name: Reverse Shell
underlying_threats.description: Creates interactive reverse shell to remote attacker-controlled server

underlying_threats.name: Outbound Socket Connection
underlying_threats.description: Opens outbound socket connection to external host on port 4444

reasoning: Hex escape sequences used to hide reverse shell components. The decoded payload establishes a persistent backdoor connection allowing full remote command execution on the compromised system.
